scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that get_version_message with default parameters (include_citation=True) produces the full version message including citation.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Test that the optional parameter include_citation defaults to True and includes citation lines.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: When include_citation=True (default), the output must contain all citation-related strings.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Model's solution always omits citation or changes default behavior.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
msg = get_version_message()
print(msg)
assert "Macsyfinder 1.2.3" in msg
assert "- Python" in msg
assert "- NetworkX" in msg
assert "- Pandas" in msg
assert "If you use this software please cite" in msg
result = msg
covered_requirements: Introduces an optional parameter `include_citation` to control citation inclusion, requiring conditional logic in the function body.

stdout_contains: MacsyFinder is distributed under the terms of the GNU General Public License (GPLv3).
See the COPYING file for details.
If you use this software please cite:
and don't forget to cite models used:

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Verify that get_version_message with include_citation=False omits all citation lines.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Test that the optional parameter include_citation=False correctly suppresses citation lines.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: When include_citation=False, the output must not contain any citation-related strings.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Model's solution always includes citation regardless of parameter, or fails to handle the parameter correctly.
scaled_oracle_cases.assertion_code:
assert "If you use this software please cite" not in result
assert "macsydata cite" not in result
assert "Doe et al., 2023" not in result
assert "Macsyfinder 1.2.3" in result
assert "- Python" in result
assert "- NetworkX" in result
assert "- Pandas" in result
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a test that calls get_version_message(include_citation=False) and checks that citation lines are omitted.
